_meta.area: Spartanburg, Greenville, Boiling Springs and the SC Upstate
_meta.note: Google Business Profile post bank. GBP posts expire ~7 days, so cadence = 1-2 per week (NOT 3/day like social). Rotate top to bottom. Each post has a CTA button. cta_type: CALL uses the profile phone (no url needed); LEARN_MORE/BOOK use cta_url. Keep summaries under ~1500 chars; shorter + local keywords works best.

posts.summary: Broken garage door spring in Spartanburg or Boiling Springs? Don't force the door — a snapped spring puts the whole weight on your opener and cables. We replace torsion springs same-day with high-cycle springs, starting around $290. Call Viking Garage Door for a free quote.

Thinking about a new garage door? A fresh door is one of the best returns on curb appeal for your home. We install insulated steel, modern flush, and carriage-house styles across the Upstate — installed from $2,050 with old-door haul-away included. Browse styles and build yours online.

Garage door opener acting up? Grinding noise, reversing halfway, or a remote that only works up close usually means a worn gear or a failing logic board. We install and calibrate LiftMaster, Chamberlain and Genie openers, including quiet belt-drive and smart Wi-Fi models. Free estimate.

Door off its track? Stop hitting the button — you'll bend the rollers and turn a small repair into a big one. We re-align tracks, replace rollers and cables, and get your door running safely again, usually within 1–2 hours. Serving Spartanburg, Greer, Duncan, Inman and Boiling Springs.

Free tip: if your garage door opens halfway then stops and reverses, check the two little safety sensors down by the floor. A knocked-out-of-line sensor or a spider web across it is the #1 cause. Two-minute fix most of the time. Still stuck? We're out across the Upstate daily.

Is an insulated garage door worth it in South Carolina? If your garage is attached or you spend time out there — yes. Insulated steel keeps the heat out in summer, runs quieter, and resists dents. On a double door, insulation adds about $260–$420. Ask us at your free estimate.

Same-day garage door repair across Spartanburg County. We keep our trucks stocked with springs, cables, rollers and openers, so most repairs are done on the first visit — no waiting around for parts. Local crew, real phone, honest pricing. Call Viking Garage Door.

Garage door dented from a bump? Sometimes we can swap just the one damaged section instead of replacing the whole door — saving you money. Send us a photo and we'll tell you straight what it needs. Free estimates for repair or full replacement across Greenville and Spartanburg.

How long do garage door springs last? Standard springs are rated for about 10,000 cycles — roughly 7 years of normal use. If yours is sounding rough or the door feels heavy, don't wait for it to snap on a Monday morning. We'll check the balance and tension free while we're out.

New to the Greenville area and need a garage door pro? We're Boiling Springs based and cover Greer, Taylors, Simpsonville and the Eastside with no trip charge. Repairs, springs, openers and new-door installs — 4.8★ from your Upstate neighbors. Call for a free estimate.

Annual garage door tune-up: we lubricate rollers and hinges, check spring tension and door balance, align the safety sensors, and calibrate the opener force. It's the cheapest way to avoid a surprise breakdown and add years to your door. Ask about it on your next call.

One cable snapped and your door is hanging crooked? Stop using it right away — it's a two-cable system and the other side is under heavy tension. We'll come make it safe and get it working the same day. Serving all of Spartanburg, Boiling Springs and Greenville.
